When an entry was removed from the LRU cache, a pointer to the removed element was not properly cleaned up.

### Impact
A local attacker can get netfoil to use more memory. By default this is limited to 100MB via systemd, which would trigger service restarts when reached.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3g4q-2f67-2gvh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-07T20:04:01Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3g4q-2f67-2gvh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3g4q-2f67-2gvh"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-07T20:04:01Z", "references": ["https://github.com/tinfoil-factory/netfoil/security/advisories/GHSA-3g4q-2f67-2gvh", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3g4q-2f67-2gvh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tinfoil-factory/netfoil/security-advisories/GHSA-3g4q-2f67-2gvh", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tinfoil-factory/netfoil", "summary": "netfoil has a resource leak in LRU cache", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-07T20:04:02Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3g4q-2f67-2gvh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.3.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/tinfoil-factory/netfoil"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.3.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
